query: Glacier Nordic Races cross country ski race Whitefish

videos.title: Winter Trail Users on Whitefish's Big Mountain Nordic Trails
videos.description: Winter trail users enjoying Whitefish's Big Mountain Nordic Trails and Haskill Basin!  Cross country skiers, classic and skate, race training, beginners, kids, fat-bikers, dogs.  And one clever drone.

videos.title: Antarctic Loppet
videos.description: The term Loppet is Scandinavian in origin and refers to a long-distance cross-country skiing event. Whether you are an elite athlete looking to push yourself in a new environment, or a cross-country skiing enthusiast seeking adventure on the White Continent, the Antarctic Loppet provides an incredible opportunity like no other.
videos.transcript:
[Music]
Three, two, one, go.
Wow. Come on.

videos.title: Antarctic Loppet 2025 - Cross-country skiing marathon in Antarctica
videos.description:
🏔️ Antarctica is calling!
Be part of the very first Antarctic Loppet 2025 — three races (10K, 20K, 50K), Union Glacier Camp comfort, guided excursions & lectures, and the raw beauty of the White Continent.

✨ A unique mix of sport, history & adventure.
📍 Union Glacier, Antarctica
📅 2025

👉 More info here: https://www.worldloppet.com/cross-country-skiing-at-the-bottom-of-the-world-the-antarctic-loppet/

videos.title: Glacier Nordic Club helps bring cross country skiing to the Flathead
videos.description: The Glacier Nordic Club offers cross country skiing at Whitefish Lake Golf Course where they created over a 7½ mile course.
videos.transcript:
